# PERF-170 positive: sync.Once.Do in a request handler
lang: go
file: PERF-170-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"sync"
)

var once sync.Once

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	once.Do(func() {
		// This runs once per process, but the atomic load
		// happens on every request.
	})
	_ = r
	_ = w
}
